action.message: When a terse continuation signal arrives, always continue implementation work autonomously but never cross into externally-visible side-effects (push, PR, deploy, message) — those require explicit per-instance approval regardless of continuation context.

When the same behavioral pattern has been recorded more than 5 times, always escalate from advisory recording to mechanical enforcement (a hook, a gate, a tool constraint) — repeated logging without a gate is itself a thrash loop.
